_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in using code analysis tools.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in refactoring research-quality data science code into production-grade, tested, documented, and deployable ML systems.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI AI domain. AI-S-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-S-004 (AB, cosine: 0.544), TF-T-006 (TF, cosine: 0.542).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.1/10 (raw 0.507). Shared vocabulary: [code, skill]. DCWF-only terms [analysis, tools, using] vs WIDAI-only terms [data, deployable, documented, grade, ml, production] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.885 (P=0.923, R=0.851). P exceeds R by 0.072 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 15 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.5%). "Skill in using code analysis tools." and "Skill in refactoring research-quality data science code into production-grade, t" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.561 > STS 0.507 (gap +0.054). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [code, skill] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 15.0%. Shared tokens: [code, skill]. DCWF-only: [analysis, tools, using]. WIDAI-only: [data, deployable, documented, grade, ml, production].

signals.detail: STS 0.507 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
